title: Replace header logo with provided new logo

requirements.text: Update the app’s primary/header logo to use the second uploaded logo image file (unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png) instead of the first uploaded logo image (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg), ensuring the logo displayed in the header matches the second logo across the site.
acceptanceCriteria: The header logo image source points to /assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png (or the equivalent static asset path used by the project).
No UI location continues to reference or render the first uploaded logo file (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg).
The logo renders correctly on both mobile and desktop without layout breakage (maintains appropriate sizing/contain behavior).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any paths listed as immutable in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Do not introduce new backend services or external integrations; this change is frontend-only static-asset/markup update.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall site layout or theme.
Changing SEO metadata, copy, or any other branding elements beyond the logo swap.

edits: Replace the first uploaded logo with the second uploaded logo (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg > unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png)
